sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, intExp2(3));
SELECT id, intExp2(value) AS exp_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET value = intExp2(4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT intExp2(2) + intExp2(3) AS combined_exp FROM test_table;
